\footnotesize{
\textit{Displacement}: Straight-line distance from baseline to final period.
\textit{Tortuosity}: Ratio of total path length to displacement (1.0 = straight path).
\textit{R}: Directional consistency measure (1.0 = perfectly consistent direction).
}
